summary: Iteration 4 e2e validation of v0.4 upgrades (Disease Overlay, Hotspot Quiz, GSAP Camera Flythrough, WebXR Hand Tracking + Floating Labels). Backend regression 16/16 pytest passing. Frontend: Disease Overlay panel renders with all 5 diseases + severity slider + clear button (verified CAD, MI w/ necrosis at 0.85), Hotspot Quiz Heart+Brain cards both open the HotspotQuiz, 10 unlabeled dots render on the 3D heart, advances through 5 questions, POSTs to /api/quiz/submit and shows result screen with XP toast. ARVR Lab xr-labels-toggle + xr-target-brain swap working, enter-ar/enter-vr buttons present, createXRStore with hand tracking compiles without runtime errors. GSAP camera flythrough on blood-flow tour visually changes the heart orientation between steps (verified in screenshot — camera angle clearly different from default).

minor.issue: Preview proxy still rewrites Cache-Control to no-store (carried over from iter3). Functionally harmless.

issues: When swapping to xr-target-brain, the procedural BrainViewer geometry renders as a spiky/wrinkled blob (visible in screenshot). It is intentional anatomical-style displacement but may look too 'noisy' compared to a smoother gyrified brain — optional polish for v0.5.

design_issues.screen: Heart Explorer Disease Overlay severity slider
issues: Slider track uses pink/rose fill; on the dark glass panel the thumb is visible but the numeric severity value is not exposed beside the slider — consider adding a small percentage label (e.g., '0.85') next to the Severity heading for better UX.

action_items: (Optional polish) Show numeric severity value beside the Disease Overlay slider.
(Optional polish) Soften the procedural brain geometry — current displacement looks more like a coral than a brain.
(Carryover from iter3) Distinguish brain tour particle color (purple) vs heart (pink); add 1-retry around emergentintegrations LlmChat for transient 502s.
critical_code_review_comments: HeartDiseaseOverlay correctly implements visibleCount = Math.max(1, Math.round(8 * severity)), so severity=0 still shows 1 plaque node and severity=1 shows all 8 — matches spec.
MI necrosis patch is gated on `mode === 'mi' && severity > 0.7` — verified visually at 0.85 severity in screenshot (dark patch on LV apex visible alongside red plaque nodes).

HotspotQuiz submits via `${API}/quiz/submit` with quiz_id='hotspot-heart' or 'hotspot-brain', score=correct count, total=questions.length. Result screen + XP toast fire correctly. Verified +0 XP and 5/5 cards render after completion.
QuizArena now exposes 3 MCQ + 2 pathway + 2 hotspot cards (data-testid='hotspot-card-heart' / 'hotspot-card-brain') as spec'd.
ARVRLab createXRStore with hand-tracking + floating Drei <Html> labels compiles cleanly — no runtime/console errors observed during target swap or labels toggle.

CameraFlythrough disables Float + OrbitControls when active and tweens camera position per step via GSAP. Verified: after starting blood-flow tour, heart orientation clearly differs from default 'floating' pose (compare screenshots heart_mi.png vs heart_tour.png — camera dollies in and rotates).
Minor: iwer (WebXR emulator) source-map warnings flood frontend webpack logs — not user-visible, but consider excluding iwer from source-map-loader to keep build logs clean.

Minor: HeartExplorer.jsx is approaching file-size threshold with the new Disease Overlay panel inline (>500 lines visible in scans). Consider extracting the sidebar panels (DiseaseOverlayPanel, GuidedToursPanel) into separate components for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical v0.4 flows (Disease Overlay, Hotspot Quiz heart+brain, ARVR labels toggle, brain target swap, GSAP tour flythrough)

test_credentials: Bearer test_session_anatomia_001 / cookie session_token=test_session_anatomia_001 (test-user-anatomia / Dr. Test / medical_student). Post-run state: XP=580 (delta +60 from quiz submissions during this run), streak=1, badges=4.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v0.4 scope (Disease Overlay, Hotspot Quiz, GSAP Flythrough, WebXR labels) is fully working end-to-end. Backend regression covered by /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py (still 16/16 green). For UI testing, set cookie session_token=test_session_anatomia_001 with sameSite=None+secure before navigating. The HotspotQuiz uses unlabeled white dots before tap — green=target, red=user-tapped-wrong (with target also revealed). DiseaseOverlay severity 0 renders 1 plaque; severity 1 renders 8. MI severity > 0.7 adds necrosis patch at apex. GSAP camera change is visually verifiable via heart orientation diff between default and tour-active screenshots.
